title: Smart Data Models - InternationalCitrusTrade
description: Data model for international market trade statistics of citrus products, aligned with international trade schemas like UN Comtrade.

type.description: NGSI Entity type. It must be InternationalCitrusTrade.

flowDesc.description: Description of the trade flow (e.g., Import, Export).

reporterDesc.description: Country or region reporting the trade.

partnerDesc.description: Primary trading partner country or region.

altQtyUnitAbbr.description: Abbreviation of the alternative quantity unit.

refYear.description: Reference year of the trade record.

refMonth.description: Reference month of the trade record.

classificationSearchCode.description: Search code used for the classification.

flowCode.description: Code identifying the trade flow type.

isAggregate.description: Flag indicating if the data is aggregated.

isAltQtyEstimated.description: Flag indicating if the alternative quantity is estimated.

isGrossWgtEstimated.description: Flag indicating if the gross weight is estimated.

isLeaf.description: Flag indicating if this is the lowest level of the product classification tree.

isNetWgtEstimated.description: Flag indicating if the net weight is estimated.

isOriginalClassification.description: Flag indicating if original classification was used.

isQtyEstimated.description: Flag indicating if the quantity is estimated.

isReported.description: Flag indicating if the data was explicitly reported by the country.

partner2Code.description: Code of the secondary partner country (e.g., country of origin/consignment).

partner2Desc.description: Description of the second partner country.

partner2ISO.description: ISO code of the second partner country.

partnerCode.description: Code of the primary partner country.

partnerISO.description: ISO code of the primary partner country.

period.description: The period of the trade data (Format: YYYYMM).

altQtyUnitCode.description: Code for the alternative quantity unit.

reporterISO.description: ISO code of the reporting country.

typeCode.description: Type code of the trade record (e.g., Goods/Services).
